case_title: GORDILLO, JORGE A. VS CORTEZ, ALEX et al

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CORTEZ, ALEX CORTEZ, MELINDA AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT GORDILLO, JORGE A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-21-1995 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GORDILLO, JORGE A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORTEZ, ALEX CORTEZ, MELINDA $970.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $985.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CORTEZ, ALEX CORTEZ, MELINDA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT GORDILLO, JORGE A. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
